MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-20-2021 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON DEC-08-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES THROUGH COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT WILL POST THE $60.00 MOTION FEE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE ALTHOUGH THE FEE WILL BE SHARED BY BOTH PARTIES. SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH IS IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL FOR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WILL BE DISCHARGED AND SANCTIONS SET ASIDE IF THE CASE SETTLES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
